name: plan-mirror
description: Review, safely improve, and independently re-check technical plans against confirmed requirements.

interface.shortDescription: Blind technical plan review with one safe revision.
interface.longDescription: Reviews a plan against a confirmed contract, optionally verifies an immutable repository snapshot, produces one improved candidate, and runs a fresh blind final review. Проверяет технический план, безопасно улучшает его и повторно оценивает независимым Critic.
defaultPrompt: Review PLAN.md against a confirmed contract.
Check whether Plan Mirror can run safely.
Проверь, готов ли Plan Mirror к безопасному запуску.
